identity.canonical_title: Semi-Direct Product of Rotation and Gauge Symmetry

theory.canonical_statement: The entry records semi-direct product of rotation and gauge symmetry through the Septenary derivation layer, using the displayed relations as operational anchors for the canonical equation chain.

canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
\eta:S\circ F\Rightarrow F\circ S.
\]
\[
\eta_X^{*}\omega_{F\circ S(X)} = \omega_{S\circ F(X)}.
\]
\[
S\circ F, \qquad F\circ S.
\]
